data.title: Vessi targets 'clean' product data to maximize AEO opportunities
data.description: Vessi's priority in terms of AEO is to make sure its products' direct data and catalog are "clean." In other words, that they're clear and optimized enough for LLMs to easily identify them. From there, AI platforms might then recommend Vessi products in their engines.

data.title: Carve Designs shares approach toward AI agents' traffic
data.description: The decision comes at a time when ecommerce technology providers Shopify and Salesforce have created integrations with large-language models (LLMs) such as OpenAI's ChatGPT.

data.title: Sysco credits AI as sales rise 4.7% in Q3
data.description: On the heels of its Restaurant Depot acquisition, Sysco's CEO said he sees new opportunities while his sales team improves retention and results with its AI360 platform.

data.title: UPS executives share impact of fuel costs on Q1, outlook for Q2
data.description: Although overall revenue declined year over year in UPS' Q1, revenue per piece grew 6.5%. Part of that growth in revenue per piece stemmed from fuel surcharges.

data.title: TransUnion launches Digital Business Profile to manage search ecosystem
data.description: Inconsistent and inaccurate business information can confuse consumers, TransUnion said, leading to poor experiences. TransUnion said it automatically distributes updates across more than 80 directories, maps, apps and social platforms.
